title: KingdomCome 1280x

Optimized Models- Object and block models are carefully crafted to maintain performance without sacrificing visuals.

body:
[patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/DreamForgeStudio)
**Try resource packs and additional options KingdomCome 256x 512x 1280x**

[discord](https://discord.gg/KVTP9SqQ3x)

[boosty](https://boosty.to/dreamforgestudio/donate)

**Dreamforge** is a studio where artistic skill and technical excellence meet in a unique symbiosis. Immerse yourself in a world of high quality textures and models, creating visual works that mesmerize and inspire. Every detail is crafted with love and attention, reflecting our passion for the perfect result.
Our team tirelessly tests and refines each model, striving for absolute realism and expressiveness. In a continuous cycle of refinements, we find the perfect combinations of materials and light so that each texture breathes life. This hard but exciting work requires patience and diligence, and we take pride in every step of the process.
At **Dreamforge**, we believe that true beauty lies in the details. We create not just models and textures, but an entire world that takes the viewer on an exciting journey.

Tested on versions:1.21.x Vanilla , Forge + Optifine, Fabric + Iris
Optifine is not requiredFor the correct display of foliage, set in the graphics settings: FANCY

The package is based on =ALTERNATIVE REALITY= with major revisions and improvements, variety and optimization, better detailing, if you want to have an idea then try =ALTERNATIVE REALITY=, but it will not show the quality that is presented here.


For better immersion we recommend using the "Fabulously Optimized" modpack.
And recommended shaderpacks:

Shrimple 

MakeUp-UltraFast 

BSL 

Chocapic13 

SEUS 

Sildur Vibrant Shaders 

Hysteria-Shaders 

Insanity-Shader 

Solas-Shader 

rethinking-voxels 

AstraLex Shaders (BSL Edit) 


Dive into the amazing world of Minecraft with the KingdomCome resource pack! This pack of textures and models offers players a look at the game from a whole new perspective. Here are the main benefits:1. Quality Textures: Each texture is highly detailed, making the world even more realistic and attractive.2. Optimized Models: Object and block models are carefully crafted to maintain performance without sacrificing visuals.3. Unique Style: "KingdomCome" offers an original art style that incorporates both natural and man-made elements.4. Compatibility: The pack integrates easily into most versions of Minecraft, making it accessible to most players.5. A variety of items: The textures of many items and blocks have been changed, giving players a new look at familiar items.6. Community Support: Active developer support, regular updates and the ability to request changes from players.Experience new adventures with "KingdomCome" and discover the endless possibilities of this unique resource pack!
